unavailable_msg: Nobody answers the door. However, you can hear someone working in the garage...
first_dialog: Oh hey, you're one of my students from last year right? How's summer going for ya?
Anyway, what brings you to my humble home this fine day?
Ah! How convenient, I was just about to do that after I finished fixing my car! Just one thing before you start -
The weeds in my yard have been really aggressive recently, so I tried buying some ultra high powered weedkiller - I bought several barrels.
The only issue is that it turns out that the weedkiller is super reactive - in short, it explodes easily and sets everything on fire.
I can't get a refund on my order so I'm just storing them in my backyard.
I've rigged up a basic sprinkler system to put out any accidental fires but I won't gaurantee it will work.
player_dialog: I'm looking for work mowing lawns.
first_job_offer: To trigger a sprinkler, just hit it with any projectile. Now, don't go about burning down my hedges, okay?
